div.head:
No. 439
Editorial Note
div.p: According to the records of the United States Delegation, with the exception of the events described in Dulte 47, infra, no meetings took place on Sunday, February 7. However Secretary Dulles held a press conference that afternoon at which he responded to questions concerning the progress of the meetings. The full text of the press conference was transmitted in Secto 103 from Berlin, February 8. (Conference files, lot 60 D 627, CF 210)
